name: Pickled Black Eyed Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the peas overnight.
2. Cook until just tender, about 40 minutes. Do not overcook.
3. Drain the peas.
4. In a large bowl, combine the peas and Italian salad dressing. Let cool.
5. Add green pepper, onion, green onions, jalapenos, pimiento, garlic, salt, hot pepper sauce, and parsley (if using). Marinate overnight.
6. Serve as a relish, on a bed of lettuce as a salad, or stuff in a tomato.
Yield: 10-12 servings
Source: Celebrate San Antonio A Cookbook by the San Antonio Junior Forum
